name: 1St Bank Of Sea Isle City
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank in Cape May County, NJ offering deposit accounts, mortgages, business banking, and debit cards with 3 branch locations.
description_long:
1st Bank of Sea Isle City is a community bank headquartered in Sea Isle City, New Jersey, serving Cape May County with physical branch locations and loan services. The bank positions itself as a regional financial institution focused on residential lending and small business banking, distinguishing itself through local expertise in Jersey Shore real estate markets.

2) The bank offers a comprehensive range of retail and business banking services including personal checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs) with competitive rates, mortgage lending (home purchase and refinancing), online bill pay, 1st Bank Visa debit cards, and business-focused bill payment solutions. They maintain an ATM network through participation in ACCEL, STAR, Visa, and PLUS networks. The bank advertises mobile and online banking access for account management and bill payment.

3) 1st Bank differentiates itself through local market knowledge, explicitly marketing itself as "Cape May County's premier housing lender" with loan officers experienced in Jersey Shore real estate financing. They offer limited-time deposit rate specials (182-day CD at 3.50% APY mentioned) and emphasize personalized service with direct loan officer contact. The bank promotes FDIC insurance backing and two-way text fraud alerts for debit card security.

4) As a traditional community bank, 1st Bank of Sea Isle City serves primarily local and regional customers. The website provides limited detail on lending requirements, loan products beyond mortgages, business loan options, or fee structures. Consumers should verify current rates, compare mortgage terms with larger institutions, and confirm product availability before applying. The bank's geographic focus limits accessibility for non-local customers. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with promotional rates
Online bill pay with recurring payment setup
1st Bank Visa debit cards with fraud protection
Business checking and business bill pay
ATM access through ACCEL, STAR, Visa, and PLUS networks
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. government guarantee
Three physical branch locations plus loan center in Cape May County for in-person banking
Specialized mortgage expertise in Jersey Shore residential markets
Online bill pay with recurring payment setup for business and personal accounts
Two-way text fraud alerts for debit card transactions with yes/no confirmation
Participation in major ATM networks (ACCEL, STAR, Visa, PLUS) for cash access
Competitive deposit rates advertised (3.50% APY on 182-day CDs as of website content)
cons: Limited geographic reach restricted to Cape May County, NJ area with only 3 branch locations
Website provides no information on deposit account fees, minimum balances, or overdraft policies
No details on business loan products, SBA lending, or commercial credit options available
Mortgage application process requires phone contact (609-263-7823); no complete online application shown
Limited information about credit card offerings beyond basic Visa debit card details

contact.address: 4301 Landis Ave, Sea Isle City, NJ 08243

best_for: Cape May County, New Jersey residents seeking local community banking with personal service
Homebuyers in Jersey Shore markets looking for mortgage lenders with regional real estate expertise
Small business owners in the area needing business checking and bill pay solutions
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured deposits and physical branch access over online-only banking
diagnosis: 1st Bank of Sea Isle City is best for Cape May County residents and Jersey Shore homebuyers seeking personalized, locally-focused community banking with in-person branch access and mortgage expertise. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—the bank only serves Cape May County, NJ with three branch locations, making it unsuitable for customers outside the region or those preferring fully digital banking with no local branch requirement.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 4301 Landis Ave, Sea Isle City, NJ 08243
